items.summary: Save the uploaded logo image as 'dhimayu-logo-black.dim_400x400.png' in frontend/public/assets/generated/. Then update Header.tsx and Footer.tsx to replace the currently used logo image (dhimayu-logo.dim_400x400.png) with this new file. The image must be rendered without any background box, card, container, or bg-* Tailwind class behind it — it must blend seamlessly with the header and footer backgrounds. Display it at an appropriate size so the yin-yang shape, both dots, and the 'Dhi'/'MayU' text are all clearly legible.
